response.justification: Strong technical background with 20+ years of experience and multiple staff-level roles, but has no formal people management experience—a hard minimum requirement for this role. While demonstrating technical leadership through mentoring, open-source projects, and senior positions, there is no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or organizational change leadership. Developer tools experience is borderline adequate. Could be reconsidered if candidate demonstrates management aptitude during interview, but represents significant risk for a people-leadership role.
strengths: Extensive technical depth: 20 years across web, mobile, embedded systems with proven expertise in architecture, system design, and complex infrastructure problems
Staff-level technical leadership: Multiple senior and staff roles at established companies demonstrating ability to guide complex technical decisions and mentor others

Developer tools experience: CI/CD infrastructure work at Altom Consulting, MCP code generators and infrastructure at re:cinq, plus open-source projects (test runners, testing libraries) show familiarity with developer productivity tools
concerns: No formal people management experience: Zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading teams—this is a stated minimum requirement (2 years) for the role
Missing organizational change leadership: No mention of leading cross-functional initiatives, organizational transformation, or strategic change—a preferred qualification
Limited mobile platform knowledge: Some iOS/Apple TV work at WatchUp is dated; no evidence of current mobile ecosystem expertise for a role supporting major mobile platform
